creator: ota@j.email.ne.jp
text:
Consoles: internal video/keyboard  BIOS driveC: is disk0

After selecting which partition to boot and displaying above output, loader takes 10 second to display the following output:
disk0: Read 32 sector(s) from 224 to 0x74670 ( 0x7e670 ): 0x10

Then after displaying disk0: above, loader takes 40 more seconds to start loading the kernel.

With 12.2-RELEASE, these steps completed instantly.

The below is first part of dmesg.  I am not sure what other information will be helpful and only grabbed first parts.  Please mention if other outputs/info will be helpful.
